nodes.name: UI-API Decoupling Skill
nodes.description: Patterns for UI data access preserving runtime boundaries across web, Electron desktop, remote server URLs, and VS Code webviews

nodes.name: API Endpoint Classification Rules
nodes.description: Official OpenCode -> opencodeClient SDK, SDK gap -> central helper in client.ts, OC-owned feature -> RuntimeAPIs or runtimeFetch, native capability -> extend RuntimeAPIs

nodes.name: runtimeFetch System
nodes.description: packages/ui/src/lib/runtime-fetch.ts rewrites /api, /auth, /health through active runtime URL resolver, injects auth, preserves SDK Request objects

nodes.name: RuntimeAPIs Contract
nodes.description: packages/ui/src/lib/api/types.ts defines RuntimeAPIs per-runtime capability contracts; consumed via useRuntimeAPIs() hook

nodes.name: Authoritative Fetch Failure Signal
nodes.description: Methods that replace/delete/clear authoritative state must throw or return null on failure; never swallow errors returning valid-looking empty success

nodes.name: Runtime Switch Flow
nodes.description: packages/ui/src/lib/runtime-switch.ts updates base URL, client token, resolver, bearer token; dispatches openchamber:runtime-endpoint-changed event for state reset

nodes.name: VS Code Route Parity Rules
nodes.description: OC local routes handled in webview, official OpenCode routes proxy to extension host, SSE uses api:sse, session message uses api:session:message, unsupported returns 501

nodes.name: Electron Security Boundary
nodes.description: API base and local origin broadly available; client token, home directory, privileged IPC local-page gated; remote connect deep-links require in-app confirmation

nodes.name: Runtime URL System
nodes.description: packages/ui/src/lib/runtime-url.ts constructs HTTP, auth, health, raw-file, SSE, WebSocket, and authenticated browser URLs; getRuntimeUrlResolver() for call-time browser-consumed URLs

nodes.name: Runtime Auth System
nodes.description: packages/ui/src/lib/runtime-auth.ts owns bearer-token state and short-lived URL-token minting; runtimeFetch merges Authorization; URL helpers add scoped oc_url_token

nodes.name: Authenticated Browser Assets Pattern
nodes.description: Small JS-fetchable assets use runtimeFetch + blob() + object URL; browser-owned URLs use getRuntimeUrlResolver().authenticatedAsset() with short-lived oc_url_token

nodes.name: Runtime API Extension Pattern
nodes.description: Add interface in types.ts, implement web HTTP in web/src/api, implement VS Code webview API, add extension-host handlers, register through app entrypoints

nodes.name: OpenChamber Server Proxy Architecture
nodes.description: OC routes registered before generic OpenCode proxy; core-routes.js installs JSON parsing; proxy.js forwards /api/* to upstream, handles SSE, readiness gating

nodes.name: UI-API Anti-Patterns Catalog
nodes.description: Comprehensive anti-pattern list: raw fetch to /api/session, runtimeFetch to SDK endpoints, prebuilding runtime HTTP URLs, window.RUNTIME_APIS reads, returning [] on failure, caching resolver forever

nodes.name: OpenChamber
nodes.description: UI runtimes (web/desktop/VS Code) for interacting with an OpenCode server; Electron desktop, VS Code extension, web PWA

nodes.name: OpenCode SDK
nodes.description: @opencode-ai/sdk/v2 providing official OpenCode API client accessed via opencodeClient wrapper in packages/ui/src/lib/opencode/client.ts

nodes.name: Electron Desktop
nodes.description: Electron 41 desktop shell in packages/electron/; boots web server in-process via startWebUiServer, manages windows/menus/dialogs/updater/deep-links/tunnels

nodes.name: VS Code Extension
nodes.description: VS Code extension + webview in packages/vscode/; bridge-based proxy for OpenChamber routes, SDK calls via extension host

nodes.name: Zustand State Management
nodes.description: Zustand stores with referential equality, leaf selectors, store splitting by change frequency, shadow Map pattern for optimistic updates

nodes.name: Bun Runtime
nodes.description: Bun as package manager and runtime (packageManager in package.json), Node >=22 required

nodes.name: Express Server
nodes.description: Express server in packages/web/server/index.js hosting OpenChamber web server and OpenCode integration
